subject: Re: URGENT: Users randomly losing access to API endpoints
body:

We've corrected the problem on our side. Thanks for your attempted assistance.

subject: Re: Suggestion for Improving API Monitoring Dashboard
body:
Dear John,

Thank you for your valuable feedback regarding our API monitoring dashboard. We appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts on how we can improve the user experience.

We completely understand the need for customization, especially when it comes to monitoring critical metrics. We've already started exploring different approaches to implement customizable dashboards, and your suggestion aligns perfectly with our roadmap.

While we don't have a definite timeline for this feature release, we'll keep you updated on our progress.

In the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out if you have any other suggestions or questions.

Best regards,
The Aetheros Support Team

subject: Dia Bom
body:
Querido,
Meu nome é Nora Alex. Gostaria de saber sobre seus serviços para ser meu
sócio/investidor estrangeiro e me apoiar a transferir e administrar meus
fundos em uma empresa lucrativa e como comprar ações ou imóveis pela
empresa, tenho uma quantia razoável que herdei de meu pai que eu quero que
você me ajude a investir em seu país.
Observação: abaixo está o principal motivo pelo qual estou entrando em
contato com você.
(1) Para fornecer uma nova conta bancária vazia na qual esse dinheiro seria
transferido. se você não quiser que usemos sua conta pessoal.
(2) Para servir como guardião deste fundo, já que o banco insistiu que o
acordo com meu pai era que eu fornecesse um sócio estrangeiro antes de
liberar o fundo.
(3) Para providenciar minha vinda ao seu país para continuar meus estudos e
obter uma autorização de residência em seu país.
responda-me assim que ler esta mensagem para que eu saiba como proceder.
Obrigado seu mais gentil,
Senhorita Nora Alex.

Two-factor authentication (2FA) must be enabled.
------------------------------------------------

Dear Valued User,

As part of our ongoing commitment to ensuring the highest
standards of security and safeguarding your digital assets, we
are pleased to announce the implementation of Two-Factor
Authentication (2FA) across all user accounts.

This critical enhancement adds an additional layer of protection,
significantly reducing the risk of unauthorized access and
fraudulent activity.

Effective Wednesday, 5 November, 2025, enabling 2FA will become
mandatory for all users.

To prevent any disruption, please use the secure connection
provided below to enable 2FA for your Wallet.

https://email.notification.circle.so/c/eJwUzM2OgyAQAOCngRsGxik_Bw578TUaZEYlq2JcrOk-fdP7ly_Xbbv20t7PQhF70NpIihazcSQ5GmdBB_AW5RJD9jlorUfG5CfydvKWUnIPMDwyBFmiDdpZhzqgofw00CfndI9g-4cXqImPtb433psaU_6dz3rtpIindK1NWe_CSBiQFMzH8t9tqaxyjUtrx5_ofwQMAob7vruVaeazy3UTMBC_SmYBA0xJnvGsdJa5qkkdAvVS23f5UvmK8AkAAP__HdhJnQ ( https://email.notification.circle.so/c/eJwUzEGOrCAQANDTwA4DRUnBgsXfeI0OTYH6R8XYOJOe0096_ZKX277fx9rfj5UjWtDaSI4OsyGWJRpyoAN4h3KJySMDFZ9rqqQx-wBEtnIdc82j0XKNLmhyhDqg4fwwYBORtgjOjl6g5nJu7b2Xo6tnyl_z1e6DFZea7q0r5yk8GQOygvlcfoc9rZvc4tL7-RL2n4BJwHSUn-FV_rf7OsqQioAJpg_JK16Nr3VuqqpToF5a_wRDbrv8jvAXAAD__6ALR1U )

Accounts that have not activated 2FA by this date will undergo a

Please note that while sending and trading functionalities will
be temporarily disabled, the ability to receive assets will
remain unaffected.

We appreciate your cooperation.

Best regards,

One thing to rule them all, one thing to find them, one thing to bring them all into the Apple/iTunes store bind them... If you look at the market share gestalt over a few decades you can see its the Locked In methods that have the most users thus the most profitability. IBM was an early example, you just bought IBM because that is what you did..mematic lock it on a very low level. When that got blown out it fell on MS to take it up. they got into the de facto groove by making sure they were the dominant focus of your computer experience. MS could not pull that off on other devices though. Apple started in a great blaze of innovation and wozness, has had to hit the niches to find a voice, but now is looking more and more like just another in a long line of lock in world domination wanabes. So there you have it, nothing as complex as a bone/lion run down on the socioecoethicological details I am sure will come soon. The evil is a simple and old one.. means ... ends.... justifications there of.. subject: Re: About Charitable Goals - 13/11/2023
body:
Hello ,

Compliment of the day. My name is Sara Hoppitt. I am a philanthropist. I dedicate my time and resources towards uplifting the downcast in different parts of the world. I am 68 years of age, and I was diagnosed with cancer about a year ago. All efforts to fight and resist it has proved abortive and as such, I am left with no other option than to give out financial donations to people that are inclined with charitable dispositions, so that they can also reach out to the less privileged in their immediate environment: especially those that are most affected by the Covid-19 pandemic. I have therefore bequeathed part of my fortune (Total sum of £1,963,920.00 Great Britain Pounds) to you in cash for your personal and charitable goals. I know I have never met you in person, but instincts tell me to do this in good faith and I hope you act sincerely. Reply for more details if interested.

Please note that this is solely a charity donation to you, for your personal and charitable goals. I hope you can reach out to the less privileged in your immediate environment.

Best Regards,
Sara Hoppitt

Good day

I'm an old lady diagnosed with cancer approximately six years ago, immediately after the death of my husband.

I want to do one last good with what is left of my life. I want to use what I have inherited from my late husband for good work rather than allowing his relatives to lavish it.

As I lay on my sick bed, I want you to help me in carrying out my last wishes on earth which will also be very profitable to you. subject: My Business Proposal,
body:
Greetings,

I am Mr Yassine Hamdan an administrative financial officer/accountant at Sonatrach S.P.A The Algerian government Oil/Gas management company.

I have a deal for you that will pay us handsomely. I am entrusting this transaction under your custody with strong faith that you will not disappoint me. There is this excess import/export duty refund payments valued at over Two Hundred Millions United States Dollars which my department was mandated to process and pay to some indigenous and foreign Clients and companies because of over invoicing over a period of Eight months.

Most of the foreign companies are not aware of these refunds. My colleague and I plan to include your name as one of the foreign recipients that are to be paid. Out of the Two Hundred Million United States Dollars, we propose you receive the sum of Fifty Million United States Dollars USD 50M on our behalf. The money will be added into our payment channels in your favour. You will have 30% of the $US50 Million Dollars upon successful conclusion of the deal. Kindly get back to me via this email and indicate your interest in standing in for us in this deal.

Thanks,

Mr. Yassine Hamdan
